div1.entryFree: Comely, becoming, decent, graceful: bashful sincerity and c. love, Ado IV, 1, 55. in most c. truth, thou deservest it, V, 2, 7. what is c. envenoms him that bears it, As II, 3, 14. he is a man of c. virtues, Tim. III, 5, 15. this is a happier and more c. time than when . . . Cor. IV, 6, 27.
